headline: Quanta (PWR) Shares Up After It Was Called A “Hidden Giant”
summary: Quanta Services Inc. (NYSE:PWR) is one of the 14 Stocks That Will Skyrocket. This is another stock that’s part of the advertisement run by Adam O’Dell. This stock is part of a $10 trillion boom that, according to O’Dell, is “the hidden giant of America’s infrastructure boom.” A sense of urgency is also introduced, with […]

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Overweight on Quanta Services, Raises Price Target to $901
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Manish A. Somaiya   maintains Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $630 to $901.
